hero.subtitle: Share a dream. Receive its symbolism decoded and its vision rendered as an ethereal portal.

input.label: Describe Your Dream
input.placeholder: I was floating through a cathedral of mirrors, each reflection showing a different version of myself reaching toward a luminous door...
input.hint: Both symbolism analysis and visual portal will appear simultaneously

oracle.title: Dream Oracle
oracle.idleDesc: Symbols, archetypes, and the language of the subconscious will be unveiled

tao.title: Tai Chu
tao.subtitle: Tao Te Ching Cosmic Cultivation
tao.error: The cosmic mystery cannot be revealed for now, please try again later.

welcome.title: The Nameless, Origin of Heaven and Earth
welcome.desc:
At the dawn of chaos, all is yet to begin.
With the heart of Wu Wei, initiate the first flow of the cosmos.
welcome.taoQuote:
The Tao gives birth to One. One gives birth to Two.
Two gives birth to Three. Three gives birth to all things.

actions.title: Tao's Natural Law
actions.wuwei_desc_0: Begin with non-action, initiate the flow of the cosmos
actions.wuwei_desc: Flow with nature, accelerate yin-yang circulation (+8 Yin-Yang)
actions.huasheng_desc_can: Spend Zhong Qi 30 → Trigger a cosmic event
actions.advance: ✦ Break Through to the Next Realm ✦

stage.max_caption: Ten thousand things bloom, the Tao endures forever

eventlog.title: Chronicle of Heaven
eventlog.empty_desc: After Hua Sheng, cosmic events will be recorded here
eventlog.ask_query: In the Boshu Laozi, what is the wisdom about 「{{stageName}}」and 「{{actionLabel}}」? Please interpret with reference to Chapter 42.

daomaster.empty_hint: Game events will auto-ask, or type your own question below
